9:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Hybrid Scoring"}]
a:["$","p",null,{"children":"Retrieval combines three signals:"}]
b:["$","$L1d",null,{"code":"score = (vector_similarity * 0.5) + \n      (fts_rank * 0.3) + \n      (temporal_proximity * 0.2)\n","language":"python"}]
c:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Signal"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Weight"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Vector similarity"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.5"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Semantic closeness to query"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"FTS5 rank"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.3"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Full-text match quality"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Temporal proximity"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.2"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recency of the memory"}]]}]]}]]}]
d:["$","p",null,{"children":"Weights are configurable per-query:"}]
e:["$","$L1d",null,{"code":"results = mem.recall(\n  \"project deadline\",\n  vector_weight=0.7,\n  text_weight=0.2,\n  temporal_weight=0.1,\n)","language":"python"}]
f:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Consolidation Pipeline"}]
10:["$","$L1e",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart TD\n  WM[Working Memory] -->|candidate| S{Scoring}\n  S -->|importance > 0.7| C[Compress with AAAK]\n  S -->|importance < 0.3| E[Evict]\n  C -->|store| EM[Episodic Memory]\n  C -->|extract| SM[Semantic Memory]\n"}]
11:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Session Grouping"}]
12:["$","p",null,{"children":"Episodic entries can be grouped by session for chronological recall:"}]
13:["$","$L1d",null,{"code":"# Store with session\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"User approved the design mockup.\",\n  session_id=\"design-review-2026-04-25\",\n  tags=[\"design\", \"approval\"],\n)\n\n# Recall entire session\nsession = mem.recall_session(\"design-review-2026-04-25\")\n","language":"python"}]
